nasb.text: A bulb shall be under the first pair of branches coming out of it, and a bulb under the second pair of branches coming out of it, and a bulb under the third pair of branches coming out of it, for the six branches coming out of the lampstand.

esv.text: and a calyx of one piece with it under each pair of the six branches going out from the lampstand.

cnv.text: 每兩個枝子的下面有球和燈臺相連，從燈臺伸出來的六個枝子，都是這樣。

ccb.text: 灯台上每一对分枝的相连处要有花苞，三对都是这样。
